title: phlox glabriflora subsp. littoralis
intro: Phlox glabriflora subsp. littoralis, also known as the coastal phlox, is a flowering plant that belongs to the phlox family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been employed to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phlox glabriflora subsp. littoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical creams for various therapeutic purposes.
